title: Hot-Join
body:
Hot-Join is a splitscreen mod that works by launching new instances and automatically resizing windows.

## Requirements
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Concentration](https://modrinth.com/mod/concentration)
- One of the following:
  - [Auth Me](https://modrinth.com/mod/auth-me) (Bring a controller mod!)
  - [Legacy4J](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j)
## Recommendations
- [TwinSession](https://modrinth.com/mod/twinsession)
## Usage
> **Remember to auto-hide the Dock (on macOS) and the Task Bar!**

### AuthMe
To log into a Microsoft account: `/hotjoin authme microsoft`
### Legacy4J
Traditional method: `/hotjoin legacy4j`  
**OR**  
> **For a more reliable experience, use the SDL controller handler.**

Click the Pause button on a connected controller that is not the current active controller. This will setup the controller automatically when the second instance launches.

---
Wait a few seconds (around 30 if you're not playing with loads of mods), and the second instance should open.

## Limitations
~~As of 0.3.0, only 2 player splitscreen is supported.~~  
As of 0.4.0, 4 player splitscreen is supported!
